analysis.reasoning: Core message: A neutral social post about a farewell lunch for former US Ambassador Ron Gidwitz with State Department colleagues and EU/Belgian diplomats, noting it was socially distanced and warm. Evaluation: EU1 (EU successful story) – not promoted; the tweet doesn't discuss EU history, achievements, or lessons. EU2 (EU united) – not promoted; no mention of EU unity, agreements, or solidarity among member states. EU3 (EU useful for citizens) – not promoted; no EU policies or benefits to citizens are referenced. EU4 (EU avant-garde actor) – not promoted; no policy leadership or pioneering action is mentioned. EU5 (EU global champion of fair causes) – not promoted; no reference to human rights or fair causes. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – not promoted; while EU and US diplomats are present, the tweet does not frame this as contributing to global cooperation or multilateralism; it's merely a social farewell. Conclusion: No listed narratives are being promoted.
